general_ui_ux_design_guidelines: Use generous spacing (2-3x typical) for a luxurious, uncluttered feel.
Do not use generic centered layouts. Asymmetry creates tension and interest.
Implement glass-morphism effects (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) for sticky headers, never use pure transparent headers.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions (excluding transform in global all).
Use pill-shaped or softly rounded buttons with interaction animations.
Incorporate subtle grain textures or noise overlays to break digital flatness.
Ensure contrast passes APCA/WCAG standards. No fully transparent backgrounds under text.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements.
Opt for optical alignment over strict geometrical alignment.

typography.strategy: The 'Old Money Tech' - Classic Serif Headings + Clean Sans Body

fonts.headings: Playfair Display or Cormorant Garamond (font-serif, elegant, high character for Book covers and headings)
fonts.body: Inter or DM Sans (font-sans, highly readable for dense content)
fonts.mono: JetBrains Mono (for BBID, tracking numbers, and order IDs)

colors.description: Warm, grounded palette reflecting Indian culture (terracotta, sage, warm sand) while maintaining trust and readability. Avoid standard SaaS Blue.

primary.description: Terracotta / Warm Rust. Used for main CTAs, Buy buttons.

secondary.description: Olive / Sage Green. For successful states, 'Available' tags, social follows.

background.description: Warm Off-white / Stone. Keeps the app feeling like physical paper.

foreground.description: Deep Charcoal, not pure black. Softer on the eyes for reading feeds.

accent.description: Warm Ochre / Sand for highlighting special editions or publisher badges.

layouts.container_padding: Internal padding of p-6 or p-8 for cards to prevent text collision.

grid_system.marketing_hero: grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Asymmetric span logic (e.g., col-span-7 and col-span-5).
grid_system.dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense layout for Store Owner/Publisher panels.
grid_system.social_feed: Max-width wrapper (max-w-2xl mx-auto) for Facebook-style timeline to maintain readability. Use sidebars for trends/suggestions.
grid_system.marketplace_grid: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-6 for Flipkart/Amazon style product listing.

surfaces: Glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 for Sticky Navbars and Chat Headers.
Neumorphism (Soft UI): Subtle ambient shadow + 1px border-border for Dashboard Cards and Product Cards.
Textures: Add a very faint SVG noise overlay on the background for a 'paper-like' tactile feel.
visual_enhancers.borders: rounded-2xl for major containers, rounded-xl for inner elements, rounded-full for buttons.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Hover: slightly lift (-translate-y-0.5) and add shadow-md.
components.product_cards: Image on top (max-h-64 object-cover), content below. 1px border. Hover: shadow-md border-primary/20.
components.social_feed_cards: Avatar, Name, Time on top. Text content, then Image. Action bar (Like, Comment, Share) at bottom. No heavy shadows, flat with 1px border.
components.chat_bubbles: Sent: bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-l-2xl rounded-tr-2xl. Received: bg-muted text-foreground rounded-r-2xl rounded-tl-2xl.
components.dashboards: Data tables using Shadcn UI. Sidebar navigation. High-density data layout without overuse of cards.

motion.hover: transition-colors duration-200, hover:-translate-y-0.5 on interactive cards.
motion.page_transitions: Fade in and slight slide up (framer-motion).
motion.social_likes: Spring animation on the heart icon when liked.

images_urls.description: Stack of vintage brown hardbound books
Street vendor selling books under a large tree in India
Woman reading book inside coffee shop
Person writing on wooden table near mug

accessibility: Ensure contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards, especially for Terracotta on Off-white.
Support keyboard navigation in Dashboards and Social Feed.
Use data-testid attributes for all functional elements (e.g., data-testid='buy-now-btn').

libraries.icons: lucide-react (default) and @phosphor-icons/react for high-end duotone icons in dashboards.
libraries.components: shadcn/ui (highly customized to match warm terracotta theme)

instructions_to_main_agent: Focus on separating the Layouts cleanly. The Marketplace should feel like an airy, trusted e-commerce site with product grids. The Social Feed should be contained (max-w-2xl) to prevent text from stretching too wide, mimicking Facebook's centered feed. The Dashboards must use dense layouts with sidebar navigation. Apply the warm 'Terracotta and Sage' palette consistently. Use framer-motion for smooth page transitions and micro-interactions.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetics.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles (pill-shaped or softly rounded) with hover animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠) for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, transitions).
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
Use sonner for toasts (/app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.js). The project uses .js files, not .tsx.
NEVER use placeholder URLs for images. Use the provided image URLs.
